column2: Look up! It's a bird, um, it's a plane? Oh, that's Saxton.
If you don't turn around, ya gonna be mincemeat!
Bloody Hell! He killed our Medic!
Aye! Did we misplace our Medic or something?
Uhh, did we forget to bring Medic?
HE BROKE ME SHIELD! KILL HIM!
Where are these bloody heads coming from?
I hope Mr. Hale loves explosives!
Ah hahahaha! Hale's gonna like this!
Wall climbing, is the bloody best!
Wait, will I wall climb higher with my Caber?
I can climb this wall with both of me eyes gone!
Medic's dead! Everyone, gather near the Dispenser!
Looks like the only Medic who's joined us today is my Dispenser!
Some like to fight harder, I like to fight smarter!
Some like to fight harder! I like to fight smarter!
You may build your body by lifting weights, Hale! I build my body by lifting heavy machinery!
You know, that big fellow over there reminds me of my grandfather.
Mr. Hale, you, sir, are about to have a real bad day!
Wait, if beer is called liquid bread and teleporting bread infects it with tumors, does that mean...?
Ok boys, Let's bring that Big Mean Mother Hubbard down!
Medic is dead! Now I am alone!
Medic's dead! Now I am alone!
Medic dead! Now I am alone!
Medic is not coming with us? Today is sad day.
Was Medic not invited to ass-kicking party!?
Medic has not joined us? NO MORE TEA PARTY FOR YOU, MEDIC!
Heavy will crush tiny Australian man!
Tiny man thinks him stronger than Heavy?
I will tickle you to death!
I will tickle you to death!
Heavy used to be rock climbing champion!
Why do we even bother walking?
We did it! We killed former boss! Wait. Why we kill former boss?
Heavy proud of team! We killed tiny, underdressed man!
Oh, I see him! I need protection!
I see him! Are you ready?
Mann Co. brand?! Feh, I made zis myself!
Mann Co. brand?! Dummkopfs! I made zis myself!
Remember, team, I am ze only thing standing between you and ze instant death!
You are quite bulletproof! Vhen ve kill you, can I take a skin sample, or maybe an arm?
Haha! Now zis is fass klettern!
Zat is not how I imagined mein career ladder.
I don't need a license to climb valls!
Bhere's huh hoctor? Hed heverybodhy helse!
MEDIC!?! OHH MEDIC! WHRR AARRE YOUU?!
Saxton Hale? Isn't that the guy with the (incoherent mumbling)?
Saxton Hale? Isn't that the guy with the (incoherent mumbling)?
Ihm ghnnh llht yhh uhp nnh fyrrhh!
Take a look to the skies, dumbass!
He's over there! Let's get him!
You just got Marked, muscle man!
No Medics left! Gotta find pills or something.
So Medic just decided to stay behind? You guys better hope I brought Mad Milk!
Wait, we have no Medic! That can't be good.
NO MEDIC!?! Pff, who needs Medics anyway, right? Heh, heh...I do.
Wait, we're going in without a Medic?! Looks like it's back to the all-pills diet for me.
Man, every new person I meet is bigger than the last! What do they have you eatin'?
Holy crap, you're even taller in person! Is it too late to back out?
Saxton? Ppf, this guy's nothing! Hey, Saxton, can I get your autograph after this? As a joke, obviously.
Oh my God, OH MY GOD, OHMYGOD! It's Saxton Hale!
Our doc is six feet down under!
No docs left! Huh, that's not good.
No docs left? I'll find a leaf and some twigs.
Looks like Medic has better things to do than help.
Alright, which one of you knuckleheads didn't invite our Medic?
Run away, run away, run away!
Outta my way, outta my way! Can't you see he's trying to kick my butt?
Time to show who the real Australian here is! You big head, wide, hairy-chest wanker!
All I need is a good view, some ammo, and a decent angle, and we'll be back for dinner.
See ya at the top, lads!
See ya at the top, lads!
Only the finest of shots, mate.
It only took one more bullet to end this.
Contact, directly in front of me!
MEDIC! Dammit, we have none, ladies!
I do not see any doctors amongst you, maggots!
I do not see any doctors amongst you, maggots!
Be careful, ladies, we don't have any Medics! Heh, heh, heh, heh, heh. Yeah, right.
They say I should not dig my own grave! Fine! Then I will dig your own grave!
Wall climbing is like rocket jumping, but you keep the rocket!
Wall climb now! That is an order!
Put on some clothes, ya hippie!
Of course it's my fault that you barely even scratched him. Sure.
Of course it's my fault that you barely even scratched him. Sure.
Stop mocking me for hiding. Just don't die next time!
Oh, merde! We have lost our Medic!
It seems our Medic has better things to do than join us!
